description: Comprehensive flood management plan for Ghatal, Daspur, and Chandrakona. Includes dam spillway widening, river dredging, and embankment reinforcement.
Restoration and development of the Singur land (formerly Tata Nano site) as a modern industrial park to attract investment.
₹40 crore+ SSC/TET teacher recruitment scam. Over 25,000 illegal appointments flagged. SIT formed to investigate and restore merit-based hiring.
CBI investigation into the Narada sting operation implicating former TMC ministers in cash-for-favor corruption.
Alleged diversion of ₹3,000 crore in MGNREGA wages through ghost beneficiaries and forged job cards in multiple districts.
Multi-modal connectivity project linking Kolkata Port to NH-16 and the Eastern Freight Corridor. Stuck due to land acquisition delays.
Phase 2 expansion of Bengal Safari Park including new animal enclosures, visitor facilities, and eco-tourism infrastructure.
Construction of a 500-bed medical college and hospital in Raiganj. 30% physical progress before work halted due to fund mismanagement.
Smart City projects across Kolkata, New Town, Durgapur, and Haldia. Severe delays due to non-cooperation with central agencies.
Development of the world's second-largest coal block in Birbhum. Stalled due to environmental clearance issues and local opposition management.
